messages.meaning: orchagent failed to program a route into the ASIC via SAI
likely_causes: ASIC FIB/TCAM table full -- check scale limits
SAI library bug or platform-specific constraint
Invalid next-hop object ID (neighbor not resolved)
next_steps: Check syncd status: docker exec syncd supervisorctl status syncd
Check ASIC utilization: show system-resources or crm show resources all
Review syncd log: docker exec syncd cat /var/log/syncd.log | tail -50
Check if next-hop neighbor exists: redis-cli -n 0 HGETALL 'NEIGH_TABLE:<interface>:<nexthop_ip>'

messages.meaning: orchagent failed to program a neighbor (ARP/ND) entry into the ASIC
next_steps: Check neighbor table capacity: crm show resources all | grep neighbor
Verify ARP entry exists in kernel: ip neigh show <ip>

messages.meaning: orchagent is falling behind processing APPL_DB notifications
likely_causes: CPU congestion -- too many routes being programmed simultaneously
syncd slow to respond (ASIC programming delay)
next_steps: Check if bulk route update in progress (e.g., BGP convergence)

messages.meaning: Port operational status changed -- link up or down event
likely_causes: Physical link change (cable, transceiver, peer port)
next_steps: Check interface status: show interfaces status
Check transceiver: show interfaces transceiver eeprom <interface>
Check for link flapping: show logging | grep <interface>

messages.meaning: orchagent warm restart state change -- reconciliation in progress or complete
likely_causes: Warm restart was initiated via config warm_restart enable
swss container restarted with warm_restart enabled
next_steps: Check warm restart state: show warm_restart state
Wait for reconciliation to complete before making config changes

messages.meaning: Critical Resource Monitoring detected resource usage above threshold
likely_causes: ASIC table approaching capacity (routes, neighbors, ACLs, next-hops)
next_steps: Check all CRM resources: crm show resources all
Identify which resource is near capacity
Review if routes/neighbors can be reduced or TCAM profile adjusted
